introSection: Broken Rail Roller Coaster is a Jinma Rides Broken Rail Coaster at Suzhou Amusement Land Forest World.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 Trains with 6 Cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Broken Rail Roller Coaster is a Jinma Rides Broken Rail Coaster at Suzhou Amusement Land Forest World.



2 Trains with 6 Cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, for a total of 24 riders per train.
